title: ornithoboea obovata
intro: Ornithoboea obovata, also known as the 'bird's eye', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. Ornithoboea obovata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional herbal medicine to promote health and well-being.
